tone: The first skill: seeing the whole before judging the parts.
lesson_summary: Every failure you have ever blamed on a person was mostly produced by a system. This mission trains you to see the system first.
read_block:
[Your lesson story or core content goes here, 400-900 words. Prefer a true story that embodies the concept. Use

systems_lesson: [The story reinterpreted: what it reveals about the underlying system or principle.]
mini_framework:
THE THREE LOOKS
1) Look at the outcome
2) Look at the incentives that produced it
3) Look at what the system rewards vs what it claims to want
think_prompts: [Concept distilled in a few lines, then one reflection question.]
think_reflection: "Where in your work does the system produce the opposite of what it claims to want?"
mission_drill:
MISSION DRILL: FIVE MINUTES.
Step 1 - Pick one recurring frustration.
Step 2 - Name the system it lives in.
Step 3 - Name one incentive feeding it.
Badge Earned: Systems Spotter - Level 1

mission_badge_description: You see systems where others see villains. You find the incentive before assigning the blame.
